message.content:
@startuml
participant "User Agent" as UA
participant "Content Upload API" as API
participant "Content database" as DB
participant "CAFF Parser" as Parser

UA -> API : Upload request (HTTP POST), contains a single CAFF file in its body.

note right of API
MUST also include a CSRF token to prevent users of other, potentially XSS vulnerable sites to take part in a massive distributed spam or DoS operation.
end note

API -> Parser : Validate upload request
Parser -> API : Return result

alt [Failed to validate uploaded content]
    API -> UA : Return an HTTP status code that signals validation failure.
    exact value depends on how the validation failed.
    alt [Request is deemed valid]
        API -> DB : Store content in database
        DB -> API : Return result of request
        alt [Upload succeeded]
            API -> UA : Return HTTP 201 Created
            API -> UA : Return HTTP status code signaling the reason for failure.
        end alt
    end alt
end alt

note right of API
Uploads should be validated by at LEAST:
* Content-Size header against max file size.
* All size fields against their respective supported bounds.
* Structure of all fields match expectations from the spec.
* Number of bytes from the upload matches number of bytes expected from in-file metadata.
end note

@enduml
